articles.title_en: VEB.RF: in Russia, the market for anti-drone technologies can reach 200 billion rubles
articles.lead_en: Cyber ​​attacks and UAV attacks are no longer an abstract risk, said Bulat Khabriev, managing investment director of the corporation.

articles.lead_en: "Global energy security is impossible without Russian energy resources," the head of the Russian Direct Investment Fund said

articles.title_en: A bill on regulating investments of Russian banks abroad was introduced to the State Duma
articles.lead_en: The changes will reduce the costs of the banks themselves and the Bank of Russia, and will also increase the regulator’s awareness, said Anatoly Aksakov, Chairman of the State Duma Committee on the Financial Market
articles.title_raw: В Госдуму внесли законопроект о регулировании инвестиций банков РФ за рубежом
articles.lead_raw: Изменения снизят издержки самих банков и Банка России, а также повысят информированность регулятора, заявил председатель комитета ГД по финансовому рынку Анатолий Аксаков

articles.title_en: India is considering buying a mine in Russia
articles.lead_en: The country intends to cooperate both in the field of procurement and import, and through the participation and investment of Indian companies, said Sandeep Paundrick, Deputy Head of the Indian Ministry of Heavy Industry and Steel
articles.title_raw: Индия рассматривает покупку шахты в России

articles.title_en: The Ministry of Economic Development does not expect inflation to accelerate with GDP growth
articles.lead_en: The task of the government and the Bank of Russia is to ensure balanced growth, noted the head of the department, Maxim Reshetnikov.

articles.title_raw: РФ и Перу намерены углублять сотрудничество в создании совместных инициатив

articles.title_en: The head of RTK-DPC described the data center market in the Russian Federation as “deficient concentration”
articles.lead_en: Among the limitations, David Martirosov listed, are a shortage of electricity in key locations, return on investment in 7-10 years, high cost of borrowed capital
articles.title_raw: Глава "РТК-ЦОД" описал рынок дата-центров в РФ как "дефицитную концентрацию"
articles.lead_raw: В числе ограничений, перечислил Давид Мартиросов, - дефицит электроэнергии в ключевых локациях, окупаемость инвестиций в 7-10 лет, высокая стоимость заемного капитала
